meaning: adj.矮胖的,粗短的n.矮脚鸡,矮沙发,短雨伞
examples: Humpy-Dumpy fell downstairs, and yet he married the princess!
To-morrow I shall hear again the story of Humpy-Dumpy, and perhaps that of Ivedy-Avedy too.
Rapper Jay-Z even appeared courtside in dumpy Rupp Arena for the regular-season Louisville game.
The dumpy riverside site, once occupied by a warehouse, was a challenge, to say the least.
